sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { SparklesIcon, ChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon, AcademicCapIcon, CheckCircleIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, LightBulbIcon, ClockIcon, RocketLaunchIcon, CloudArrowUpIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Home = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); if (user) { window.location.href = '/dashboard'; return null; } const features = [ { icon: CloudArrowUpIcon, title: "Resume Upload", description: "Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format. The system extracts text for analysis.", bgLight: "bg-blue-50", iconColor: "text-blue-600" }, { icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon, title: "Job Description", description: "Paste the job description you want to compare against your resume.", bgLight: "bg-purple-50", iconColor: "text-purple-600" }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: "ATS Score", description: "Get a score showing how well your resume matches the job requirements.", bgLight: "bg-green-50", iconColor: "text-green-600" }, { icon: AcademicCapIcon, title: "Skill Analysis", description: "See which skills match and which skills are missing from the job description.", bgLight: "bg-orange-50", iconColor: "text-orange-600" }, { icon: LightBulbIcon, title: "Suggestions", description: "Receive recommendations to improve your resume for better matching.", bgLight: "bg-yellow-50", iconColor: "text-yellow-600" }, { icon: ClockIcon, title: "History", description: "Save your analyses to track changes over time.", bgLight: "bg-indigo-50", iconColor: "text-indigo-600" } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Resume Analyzer

Upload your resume, paste a job description, and get analysis on how well they match.

{/* Features Section */}

Features

What this application does

{features.map((feature, index) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* How It Works */}

How to Use

Simple steps to analyze your resume

{[ { step: "1", title: "Create Account", desc: "Sign up with email", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { step: "2", title: "Upload Resume", desc: "PDF or DOCX file", icon: CloudArrowUpIcon }, { step: "3", title: "Paste Job Description", desc: "Copy from job posting", icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon }, { step: "4", title: "View Results", desc: "See analysis and suggestions", icon: SparklesIcon } ].map((step, index) => (
{step.step}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Start analyzing your resume

); }; export default Home;
